allow: PowerShell($html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/es/itinerarios/bolivia-chile-salar-pascua" -UseBasicParsing; $match = [regex]::Match\($html.Content, 'AggregateOffer'\); if \($match.Success\) { "✓ AggregateOffer found" } else { "✗ Not found" }; $match2 = [regex]::Match\($html.Content, '"offers"'\); if \($match2.Success\) { "✓ offers key found" } else { "✗ offers key not found" })
